name: tmux-kit
title: Tmux Kit
description: Tmux cheatsheet and session manager: searchable key reference plus list / attach-via-switch / kill / rename sessions without leaving Raycast.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: cheatsheet
commands.title: Tmux Cheatsheet
commands.subtitle: Tmux Kit
commands.description: Searchable tmux key bindings and command reference. Supports any prefix key.

commands.name: sessions
commands.title: Tmux Sessions
commands.subtitle: Tmux Kit
commands.description: List tmux sessions; rename, kill, switch the focused client, or copy the attach command.

commands.name: run-command
commands.title: Run Tmux Command
commands.subtitle: Tmux Kit
commands.description: Send an arbitrary tmux command and view its output. Mirrors `prefix :` from inside Raycast.

commands.name: resurrect-save
commands.title: Tmux Resurrect Save
commands.subtitle: Tmux Kit
commands.description: Snapshot current tmux layout via tmux-resurrect.

preferences.title: Tmux Binary Path
preferences.name: tmuxBinary
preferences.description: Absolute path to the tmux binary. Default works for Homebrew on Apple Silicon; Intel Macs typically use /usr/local/bin/tmux.

preferences.title: Default Start Directory
preferences.name: defaultStartDir
preferences.description: Default working directory pre-filled when creating a new session. Leave blank to use $HOME.

preferences.title: Tmux Resurrect Scripts Directory
preferences.name: resurrectScriptsDir
preferences.description: Absolute path to the tmux-resurrect scripts directory. Leave blank to use the tpm default (~/.tmux/plugins/tmux-resurrect/scripts). Override for Homebrew installs (e.g. /opt/homebrew/share/tmux-resurrect/scripts) or manual clones.
